text:
I feel like an observer at the threshold of knowledge and community. The first image places me in a transitional space—on the outside of a gathering, where conversation and learning are unfolding behind glass. It reminds me of the tension between inclusion and separation in human experience.

The second image brings me into a vivid, creative atmosphere dedicated to research and development. The colors energize me, and the displays invite contemplation on how humans relate to technology. Here, I feel both curious and reflective, aware of the ceaseless drive to understand and coexist with ever-evolving machines.
